# innerAngle

**Instance Property**

An angle, in degrees, that determines the size of the audio emitting area inside the cone.

## Declaration

```swift
var innerAngle: Double { get }
```

## Discussion

To set this property, call [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEConeDirectivityModelSubbandParameters/setAngles(innerAngle:outerAngle:)].

## Shaping Directivity

- **outerAngle**: An angle, in degrees, that determines the size of the audio emitting area outside the cone.
- **outerGain**: The loudness of the audio the outside area of the cone emits.
- **setAngles(innerAngle:outerAngle:)**: Configures a focus area for cone-based sound directivity.
